Skins accessoryFits only Jones splitboardsQuick Tension Tail Clips are a lightweight tail clip designed to fit all 2017 and newer splitboards. The tail clips adjust to length to allow for the perfect skin tension for your splitboard size. Tail clips must be installed on skins.Includes2x rubber extension straps8x rivets2x Quick Tension tail clipCompatible with:All Jones splitboards (2017 or newer)Key benefitsAdjustable length for perfect skin tensionEasy install on skins with rivetsFits all 2017 or newer Jones splits

Rider Reviews5.01 reviewVerified5140302010Leave a reviewFiltersSort reviews byMost recentHighest ratingLowest ratingOnly picturesPictures firstVideos firstMost helpfulJASON K.VerifiedGood upgrade over pomoca universal clipThe clip holds the skins on much better than the pomoca universal tail clip does, but I wish I didn't have to buy the strap with the clip - it's a waste of material since I'll probably never use them (and $$$). Pomoca skins fit better than the jones skins but the clip sucks; jones skins have the right tail clip but the front attachment point is at the wrong angle and that creates a bubble so snow builds up under them. Please  Jones, solve this conundrum!
